chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 106 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.463/2023 (U/A) 2. For hearing of main case 24.01.2023 Mr. Shahid Hussain Gopang, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency application is granted. 2. Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks recovery of alleged detainees who have been taken away, as per petitioner, by S.H.Os of Police Stations ‘A’ & ‘B’ Sections, Khairpur. The appropriate remedy is available to the petitioner under Section 491, Cr.P.C. before the Sessions Court concerned; hence, this petition is converted into an application under Section 491, Cr.P.C. with direction to office to transmit the same to learned Sessions Judge, Khairpur for disposal in accordance with law, on merit after providing opportunity of hearing to the parties. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
